mnemonics: ACID: Atomicity, Consistency, Isolation, Durability - like a strong acid foundation for database transactions
keyPoints: Entity Integrity ensures primary keys are unique and not null
Referential Integrity ensures foreign keys match existing primary keys
Domain Constraints restrict data to valid predefined values
commonMistakes: Forgetting to enforce foreign key constraints leading to orphaned records
Creating primary keys with null values violating entity integrity
Defining domains too broadly allowing invalid data entries
